ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the currency pair at the start of the timeframe */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the currency pair during the timeframe */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the currency pair during the timeframe */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the currency pair at the end of the timeframe */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the timeframe */,
  "currency_pair" TEXT /* Currency pair (e.g., GBPUSD, EURUSD) */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe of the data (e.g., 5Min, 15Min, 1H, 1D) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the data entry */,
  "is_real_time" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is real-time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Permission ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data usage entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data ID */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of data usage */,
  "usage_time" TEXT /* Time of data usage */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, trade) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
